CREATE TABLE test_http_url (id INT, content VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_http_url VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, ' % Test'), (3, 'Special chars: % & <>');
SELECT http_url(content) FROM test_http_url WHERE id = 1;
SELECT http_url(content) AS escaped_content FROM test_http_url WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_http_url WHERE content LIKE '%<b>%');
SELECT id, http_url(content) FROM test_http_url WHERE content != '' ORDER BY id DESC;
CREATE TABLE nested_test AS SELECT id, http_url(content) AS http_content FROM test_http_url WHERE id <= 2;
SELECT (SELECT http_url(content) FROM test_http_url WHERE id = 3) AS special_char_content, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_http_url) AS total_records;
SELECT A.id, http_url(A.content) AS http_url_content FROM test_http_url A JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_http_url WHERE content LIKE '%<b>%') B ON A.id = B.id;
SELECT http_url(content || ' ' || (SELECT content FROM test_http_url WHERE id = 1)) FROM test_http_url WHERE id = 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT http_url(content) FROM test_http_url) AS temp_table;
